mapper.select: SELECT * FROM winyo_mentions ORDER BY category ASC, min_val ASC, priority DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE winyo_mentions SET level_name = #{levelName}, message = #{message}, min_val = #{minVal}, max_val = #{maxVal}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE mention_id = #{mentionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM winyo_mentions WHERE category = #{category} AND condition_code = #{conditionCode} ORDER BY priority DESC LIMIT 1
